item.title: Jack Ruby Found Guilty in Oswald Shooting
item.description: On this day in 1964, Jack Ruby was convicted for killing Lee Harvey Oswald. The trial marked the first televised U.S. courtroom verdict, a historic moment in American history.

media:content.media:title: Jack Ruby Found Guilty in Oswald Shooting
media:content.media:description: On this day in 1964, Jack Ruby was convicted for killing Lee Harvey Oswald. The trial marked the first televised U.S. courtroom verdict, a historic moment in American history.

item.title: The Hardest Day of My Life
item.description: A veteran recounts the most challenging day of their life. Personal stories of struggle, resilience, and the moments that tested courage and determination.

media:content.media:title: The Hardest Day of My Life
media:content.media:description: A veteran recounts the most challenging day of their life. Personal stories of struggle, resilience, and the moments that tested courage and determination.

item.title: From Vietnam Battlefield to Olympic Stage
item.description: Follow the inspiring journey from serving in Vietnam to competing in the Olympics. A story of resilience, dedication, and achieving extraordinary goals.

media:content.media:title: From Vietnam Battlefield to Olympic Stage
media:content.media:description: Follow the inspiring journey from serving in Vietnam to competing in the Olympics. A story of resilience, dedication, and achieving extraordinary goals.

item.title: WWII Pilot Reveals the True Flight Story
item.description: A WWII combat pilot shares firsthand accounts of a historic flight. Discover the challenges, decisions, and experiences that defined the mission in detail.

media:content.media:title: WWII Pilot Reveals the True Flight Story
media:content.media:description: A WWII combat pilot shares firsthand accounts of a historic flight. Discover the challenges, decisions, and experiences that defined the mission in detail.

item.title: WWII Pilot Survives First Combat Mission
item.description: Paul “Bud” Haedike faced intense danger on his first mission as Tail End Charlie. Despite engine damage from German fire, he crash-landed safely and flew 22 more missions.

media:content.media:title: WWII Pilot Survives First Combat Mission
media:content.media:description: Paul “Bud” Haedike faced intense danger on his first mission as Tail End Charlie. Despite engine damage from German fire, he crash-landed safely and flew 22 more missions.

item.title: Navy SEAL on Hostage Rescue Against Taliban
item.description: A Navy SEAL recounts a high-stakes hostage rescue, including hand-to-hand combat with the Taliban. Hear firsthand experiences of courage and tactical skill in the field.

media:content.media:title: Navy SEAL on Hostage Rescue Against Taliban
media:content.media:description: A Navy SEAL recounts a high-stakes hostage rescue, including hand-to-hand combat with the Taliban. Hear firsthand experiences of courage and tactical skill in the field.

item.title: Korean War Veteran Shares Combat Experience
item.description: A Korean War veteran recounts firsthand what combat was truly like. Personal stories reveal the challenges, intensity, and realities faced on the battlefield.

media:content.media:title: Korean War Veteran Shares Combat Experience
media:content.media:description: A Korean War veteran recounts firsthand what combat was truly like. Personal stories reveal the challenges, intensity, and realities faced on the battlefield.

item.title: The Personal Toll of War
item.description: A veteran reflects on the physical and emotional impact of war. Honest insights into how combat and service leave lasting effects on those who serve.

media:content.media:title: The Personal Toll of War
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on the physical and emotional impact of war. Honest insights into how combat and service leave lasting effects on those who serve.

item.title: Green Beret Michael Rodríguez’s Service Story
item.description: Michael “Rod” Rodríguez recounts 21 years as a Green Beret, 10 deployments, combat injuries, and efforts to help civilians, including the struggles of women in Afghanistan.

media:content.media:title: Green Beret Michael Rodríguez’s Service Story
media:content.media:description: Michael “Rod” Rodríguez recounts 21 years as a Green Beret, 10 deployments, combat injuries, and efforts to help civilians, including the struggles of women in Afghanistan.

item.title: The Korean War: Harder Than You Think
item.description: Explore the harsh realities of the Korean War, from brutal combat to extreme conditions. Learn why this conflict was more intense and challenging than commonly remembered.

media:content.media:title: The Korean War: Harder Than You Think
media:content.media:description: Explore the harsh realities of the Korean War, from brutal combat to extreme conditions. Learn why this conflict was more intense and challenging than commonly remembered.

item.title: Finding Faith on Iwo Jima
item.description: A veteran recounts a profound spiritual experience on Iwo Jima. Discover how the intensity of battle led to a deep personal connection with faith during WWII.

media:content.media:title: Finding Faith on Iwo Jima
media:content.media:description: A veteran recounts a profound spiritual experience on Iwo Jima. Discover how the intensity of battle led to a deep personal connection with faith during WWII.

item.title: The Last Living D-Day Pilot
item.description: Meet the final surviving pilot from D-Day who navigated history. Hear firsthand stories of bravery, strategy, and the crucial role they played in WWII’s pivotal invasion.

media:content.media:title: The Last Living D-Day Pilot
media:content.media:description: Meet the final surviving pilot from D-Day who navigated history. Hear firsthand stories of bravery, strategy, and the crucial role they played in WWII’s pivotal invasion.
